prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京大学在陕西理科（含物理类）最低录取位次分别为约63名→53名→44名→69名→119名，2021–2023年呈小幅前移趋势，2024年回退至69名，2025年大幅后移至119名，近两年累计后移约75名，波动明显增大；2025年基准位次约119名；该校在陕西理科组招生计划2021–2024年均为20人，2025年增至23人，2026年计划30人，较2025年扩招约30.4%，为近年最大扩幅；扩招将增加供给，对位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续稳居第2名，属全国顶尖层次，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及校园安全、录取断档、食堂宿舍等舆情事件8起；但抖音热度排名总榜第3（高热），短视频曝光量极高；2025年投档异常信号为高关注（湖北提前批首次空档），整体报考关注度仍处高位；北京大学A-及以上学科达40余个，涵盖数学A+、物理学A+、化学A+、生物学A+、计算机科学与技术A+、法学A+、经济学A+等，学科实力全国顶尖，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等理科热门专业持续高热推荐；陕西省2026年物理类考生约206500人，较2025年172468人增长约19.7%，竞争显著加剧；北京大学位于北京（非本省），在陕西招生占比约1.4%–2.6%（2021–2025年），属跨省招生，无本省倾斜；陕西考生对北京高校地域偏好较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次已大幅后移（119名）、2026年扩招约30.4%增加供给、本省物理类考生增长约19.7%加剧竞争，以及北大顶尖吸引力对位次的支撑作用，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年119名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约141名，区间91–191名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班类（元培）（数学类、物理学类、地球物理学类、计算机类、电子信息类）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学类（物理学、大气科学）
- 电子信息类（电子信息科学与技术、微电子科学与工程）
- 生物科学类（生物科学、生物技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班类（理论与应用力学、工程力学、航空航天工程等）
- 天文学（天体物理、天文高新技术和应用）
- 信息管理与信息系统。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（91–191名）内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如进入前100名）可重点冲击一档的元培试验班、数学类、计算机类等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（约190名）应以三档专业为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University in Shaanxi science (including physics category) were approximately 63 → 53 → 44 → 69 → 119. From 2021 to 2023, there was a slight upward trend, but in 2024 it fell back to 69, and in 2025 it significantly dropped to 119, with a cumulative decline of about 75 places over the past two years, showing increased volatility. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 119. The enrollment plan for Peking University in Shaanxi science category was 20 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 23 in 2025, and planned to be 30 in 2026, an expansion of about 30.4% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years. The expansion will increase supply, putting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 2nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, belonging to the top tier nationally, with strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving 8 public opinion incidents related to campus safety, admission gaps, and dormitory cafeterias. However, its Douyin popularity ranks 3rd overall (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure. In 2025, there was an abnormal admission signal of high attention (first vacancy in Hubei early batch), but overall application attention remains high. Peking University has over 40 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science and Technology, Law, and Economics, with top-tier academic strength nationwide, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shaanxi is approximately 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% from 172,468 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Peking University is located in Beijing (not in the province), with a Shaanxi enrollment share of about 1.4%–2.6% (2021–2025), representing cross-provincial enrollment without provincial preference. Shaanxi candidates have a strong regional preference for Beijing universities.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant decline in 2025 rankings (119), the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 30.4% increasing supply, the 19.7% growth in local physics category candidates intensifying competition, and the support of Peking University's top-tier appeal on rankings, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will continue to decline slightly from the 2025 baseline of 119. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 141, with a range of 91–191.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei) (Mathematics, Physics, Geophysics, Computer Science, Electronic Information)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Physics (Physics, Atmospheric Science)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science, Biotechnology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Engineering Mechanics, Aerospace Engineering, etc.)
- Astronomy (Astrophysics, Astronomical High-Tech and Applications)
- Information Management and Information Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (91–191), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., entering the top 100), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 flagship majors such as Yuanpei Experimental Class, Mathematics, and Computer Science. If your ranking is near the upper limit (about 190), you should choose Tier 3 majors as a safe option.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京大学在陕西文科（含历史类）最低录取位次分别为约24名→24名→32名→29名→32名，整体在24–32名区间窄幅波动，近5年最大波动仅8名，稳定性极高；2025年基准位次约32名；该校在陕西文科组招生计划2021年21人、2022–2025年均为19人，2026年计划24人，较2025年扩招约26.3%，为近年首次明显扩招；扩招将增加供给，对位次有后移压力。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续稳居第2名，属全国顶尖层次，文科综合实力尤为突出；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及校园安全、录取断档、食堂宿舍等舆情；但抖音热度排名总榜第3（高热），短视频曝光量极高；2025年投档异常信号为高关注（湖北提前批首次空档），整体报考关注度仍处高位；北京大学文科优势学科密集：中国语言文学A+、法学A+、社会学A+、应用经济学A+、工商管理A+、哲学A+、考古学A+、新闻传播学A-等，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、汉语言/中文等文科专业社会热度偏热推荐；陕西省2026年历史类考生约88500人，较2025年75641人增长约17%，竞争有所加剧；北京大学位于北京（非本省），在陕西文科招生占比约2%–3%，属跨省招生；陕西考生对北京高校地域偏好较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次高度稳定（24–32名区间）、2026年扩招约26.3%增加供给、本省历史类考生增长约17%加剧竞争，以及北大文科顶尖吸引力对位次的支撑，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年32名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约37名，区间27–47名。

一档（最难进）

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Peking University in Shaanxi liberal arts (including history category) were approximately 24 → 24 → 32 → 29 → 32, fluctuating narrowly within the 24–32 range, with a maximum fluctuation of only 8 positions over the past 5 years, indicating extremely high stability; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 32; the university's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Shaanxi was 21 in 2021 and 19 from 2022 to 2025, with a plan of 24 for 2026, an increase of about 26.3% compared to 2025, marking the first significant expansion in recent years; the expansion will increase supply, exerting downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 2nd in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, placing it at the top national level, with particularly outstanding comprehensive strength in liberal arts; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, involving campus safety, admission gaps, dormitory and cafeteria issues; however, it ranks 3rd in Douyin popularity (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure; the abnormal signal for 2025 enrollment is high attention (first vacancy in Hubei early batch), overall enrollment attention remains high; Peking University has a dense concentration of advantageous liberal arts disciplines: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Law A+, Sociology A+, Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, Philosophy A+, Archaeology A+, Journalism and Communication A-, etc., highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature is relatively high and recommended; the number of history category candidates in Shaanxi for 2026 is approximately 88,500, an increase of about 17% compared to 75,641 in 2025, intensifying competition; Peking University is located in Beijing (not in the province), accounting for about 2%–3% of liberal arts enrollment in Shaanxi, representing cross-provincial enrollment; Shaanxi candidates have a strong regional preference for universities in Beijing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high stability of historical rankings (24–32 range), the approximately 26.3% enrollment expansion in 2026 increasing supply, the approximately 17% increase in local history category candidates intensifying competition, and the top-tier appeal of Peking University's liberal arts supporting rankings, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will slightly decrease from the 2025 ranking of 32; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 37, with a range of 27–47.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Yuanpei) (Chinese Language and Literature, Archaeology, History, Philosophy, Sociology, Law, Journalism and Communication, Economics, Business Administration, Public Administration)
- Law
- Economics (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade, Public Finance).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese Language, Classical Philology, Applied Linguistics)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism, Radio and Television, Advertising)
- Sociology (Sociology, Social Work).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Philosophy (Philosophy, Religious Studies, Philosophy (Philosophy of Science and Technology and Logic Direction))
- Archaeology
- English (recruits candidates with English as foreign language).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (27–47), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within the top 27), focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Yuanpei Experimental Class, Law, and Economics; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (approximately 47), choose Tier 3 majors as a safe option.
